Traditional Format

  • Use this card against "Zombie", "Dark World", and other such archetypes predominantly make use of card effects in the Graveyard.
    • This card can be kept in the Side Deck for almost any Deck capable of Summoning a Rank 4 Xyz Monster.
  • Given this card's effect can be activated at any time, it can quickly enable any material with a vital GY effect.
  • In a "Gishki" Deck, this card can be easily Xyz Summoned by the effect of "Gishki Beast" and give your "Gishki" monsters a 500 ATK-boost.
    • This card can also be used to get rid of "Elemental HERO Absolute Zero" and avoid its effect:
      • Activate this card's effect, then activate "Forbidden Arts of the Gishki" to Ritual Summon "Evigishki Levianima" or "Soul Ogre" by Tributing "Absolute Zero".
  • Using "Atlantean Dragoons" as a Material can give this card the ATK boost, and also get to search for any Sea Serpent-Type monster from your Deck when its effect is activated.
